title: ParadoxConfig
body:
Paradox Config provides is a lightweight, version agnostic, kotlin-based configuration library for other Fabric mods to use; Default serializers for Jankson, GSON, and TOML are provided though are completely optional as Paradox Config provides the APIs for creating your own.


When depending on Paradox Config, please use it as an embedded dependency as it's far to small to make other users download it themselves when downloading your mod.
